description: Template for creating tester accounts in GoClear client portal. Replace placeholder values before use.
notes: Create these in Supabase Auth dashboard (Authentication → Users → Add User). After creating the auth user, the SECURITY DEFINER trigger on auth.users INSERT will auto-create tenant_memberships and client_profiles rows.

testers.notes: Replace email with real tester email before use
Replace email with real tester email before use

creation_steps: 1. Go to Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Users → Add User
2. Enter email and password (use strong password, share securely)
3. Check 'Auto Confirm Email' to skip email verification
4. After creation, the trigger auto-creates: memberships row + client_profiles row
6. Share credentials via secure channel (not email)
